lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੈ ਉਧਰੈ ਸੋ ਕਲਿ ਮਹਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਾਝਾ ॥੪॥੩॥੫੦॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam japai udharai so kal meh ghatt ghatt naanak maajhaa |4|3|50|
lines.english: One who, as Gurmukh, chants the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is saved. In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, O Nanak, God is permeating the hearts of each and every being. ||4||3||50||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੈ ਸੋਈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਾਨਹਿ ਓਇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh karai soee prabh maaneh oe raam naam rang raate |
lines.english: Whatever God causes to happen is accepted, by those who are attuned to the Love of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਸਭਨੀ ਥਾਈ ਜਿਨੑ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਪਰਾਤੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tina kee sobhaa sabhanee thaaee jina prabh ke charan paraate |1|
lines.english: Those who fall at the Feet of God are respected everywhere. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਬਣਿ ਆਈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਪਨੇ ਸਿਉ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਸੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa ban aaee prabh apane siau jal thal maheeal soee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The devotees are in harmony with their God; He is in the water, the land, and the sky. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤਾ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: mere raam har santaa jevadd na koee |
lines.english: O my Lord, no one is as great as the Lord's Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਅਪ੍ਰਾਧੀ ਸੰਤਸੰਗਿ ਉਧਰੈ ਜਮੁ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kott apraadhee santasang udharai jam taa kai nerr na aavai |
lines.english: Millions of sinners have been saved in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; the Messenger of Death does not even approach them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਭਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਕਾਟੈ ਸੰਤ ਸਰਣਿ ਜੋ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa moh bharam bhau kaattai sant saran jo aavai |
lines.english: Attachment to Maya, doubt and fear are eradicated, when one enters the Sanctuary of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕਾ ਬਿਛੁੜਿਆ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਿਨੑ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਆਣਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: janam janam kaa bichhurriaa hovai tina har siau aan milaavai |2|
lines.english: Those who have been separated from the Lord, for countless incarnations, are reunited with the Lord again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹਾ ਮਨੋਰਥੁ ਕਰਿ ਆਰਾਧੇ ਸੋ ਸੰਤਨ ਤੇ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jehaa manorath kar aaraadhe so santan te paavai |3|
lines.english: Whatever wishes one harbors, are obtained from the Saints. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਕੇਤਕ ਬਰਨਉ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਪਨੇ ਭਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: jan kee mahimaa ketak barnau jo prabh apane bhaane |
lines.english: How can I describe the glory of the Lord's humble servants? They are pleasing to their God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਸੇ ਸਭ ਤੇ ਭਏ ਨਿਕਾਣੇ ॥੪॥੪॥੫੧॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jin satigur bhettiaa se sabh te bhe nikaane |4|4|51|
lines.english: Says Nanak, those who meet the True Guru, become independent of all obligations. ||4||4||51||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਮਾਣੁ ਤਾਣੁ ਰਿਦ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹੋਰ ਦੂਜੀ ਆਸ ਚੁਕਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: teraa maan taan rid antar hor doojee aas chukaaee |1|
lines.english: Deep within my heart, I respect Your strength; I have abandoned all other hopes. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਤੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਹਾਥ ਦੇ ਰਾਖੇ ਪਏ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa agan te tudh haath de raakhe pe teree saranaaee |
lines.english: Giving me Your Hand, You saved me from the terrible fire, when I sought Your Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਇ ਤੁਧੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਆਇਐ ਉਬਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: mere raam raae tudh chit aaeiai ubare |
lines.english: O my Sovereign Lord, when You enter my consciousness, I am saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਟੇਕ ਭਰਵਾਸਾ ਤੁਮੑਰਾ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਤੁਮੑਾਰਾ ਉਧਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: teree ttek bharavaasaa tumaraa jap naam tumaaraa udhare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You are my support. I count on You. Meditating on You, I am saved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧ ਕੂਪ ਤੇ ਕਾਢਿ ਲੀਏ ਤੁਮੑ ਆਪਿ ਭਏ ਕਿਰਪਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: andh koop te kaadt lee tuma aap bhe kirapaalaa |
lines.english: You pulled me up out of the deep, dark pit. You have become merciful to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਿ ਸਮੑਾਲਿ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖ ਦੀਏ ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saar samaal sarab sukh dee aap kare pratipaalaa |2|
lines.english: You care for me, and bless me with total peace; You Yourself cherish me. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਬੰਧਨ ਕਾਟਿ ਛਡਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aapanee nadar kare paramesar bandhan kaatt chhaddaae |
lines.english: The Transcendent Lord has blessed me with His Glance of Grace; breaking my bonds, He has delivered me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਈ ਆਪੇ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aapanee bhagat prabh aap karaaee aape sevaa laae |3|
lines.english: God Himself inspires me to worship Him; He Himself inspires me to serve Him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੁ ਗਇਆ ਭੈ ਮੋਹ ਬਿਨਾਸੇ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਸਗਲ ਵਿਸੂਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bharam geaa bhai moh binaase mittiaa sagal visooraa |
lines.english: My doubts have gone, my fears and infatuations have been dispelled, and all my sorrows are gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਇਆ ਕਰੀ ਸੁਖਦਾਤੈ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ॥੪॥੫॥੫੨॥
lines.translit: naanak deaa karee sukhadaatai bhettiaa satigur pooraa |4|5|52|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord, the Giver of peace has been merciful to me. I have met the Perfect True Guru. ||4||5||52||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨਾ ਖੇਲੁ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖੈ ਠਾਕੁਰਿ ਰਚਨੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: apanaa khel aap kar dekhai tthaakur rachan rachaaeaa |1|
lines.english: The Lord Himself set His play in motion, and He Himself beholds it. He created the Creation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਕਛੁ ਨ ਸੀਓ ਤਬ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਵਨ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jab kachh na seeo tab kiaa karataa kavan karam kar aaeaa |
lines.english: When nothing existed, what deeds were being done? And what karma caused anyone to be born at all?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਇ ਮੁਝ ਤੇ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: mere raam raae mujh te kachhoo na hoee |
lines.english: O my Sovereign Lord, I cannot do anything at all by myself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ਸਰਬ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਸੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aape karataa aap karaae sarab nirantar soee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He Himself is the Creator, He Himself is the Cause. He is pervading deep within all. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਣਤੀ ਗਣੀ ਨ ਛੂਟੈ ਕਤਹੂ ਕਾਚੀ ਦੇਹ ਇਆਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: ganatee ganee na chhoottai katahoo kaachee deh eaanee |
lines.english: If my account were to be judged, I would never be saved. My body is transitory and ignorant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਰਣੈਹਾਰੇ ਤੇਰੀ ਬਖਸ ਨਿਰਾਲੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kripaa karahu prabh karanaihaare teree bakhas niraalee |2|
lines.english: Take pity upon me, O Creator Lord God; Your Forgiving Grace is singular and unique. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭ ਤੇਰੇ ਕੀਤੇ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਤੁਹੀ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh tere keete ghatt ghatt tuhee dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: You created all beings and creatures. Each and every heart meditates on You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਤੂਹੈ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: teree gat mit toohai jaaneh kudarat keem na paaeeai |3|
lines.english: Your condition and expanse are known only to You; the value of Your creative omnipotence cannot be estimated. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਗੁਣੁ ਮੁਗਧੁ ਅਜਾਣੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: niragun mugadh ajaan agiaanee karam dharam nahee jaanaa |
lines.english: I am worthless, foolish, thoughtless and ignorant. I know nothing about good actions and righteous living.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਕਰਹੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਮਿਠਾ ਲਗੈ ਤੇਰਾ ਭਾਣਾ ॥੪॥੬॥੫੩॥
lines.translit: deaa karahu naanak gun gaavai mitthaa lagai teraa bhaanaa |4|6|53|
lines.english: Take pity on Nanak, that he may sing Your Glorious Praises; and that Your Will may seem sweet to him. ||4||6||53||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
